cards.front: What is a stream in C++ I/O system?
cards.back: A stream is a reference to an input/output device or source of data
An input stream that reads data from a source
An output stream that writes data to a destination
The <fstream> header file provides functions for input/output operations on files

cards.front: What is the 'open' function used for?
cards.back: The 'open' function is used to open a file for input/output operations
